MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Fred Dought.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Anthony Deufemia is not present.
Attorney Kyle Bassman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Jan. 14, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
